verdict.answer_first: B states the plan in sentence 1: "never change the meaning of an existing contract; only add to it"; A is also direct but opens broader: "Here's a battle-tested plan".
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleaner to one default: "default to URL path versioning"; A recommends path versioning but spends more space on alternatives and a follow-up.
verdict.fabrication: A invents context not given: "This dir (`/private/tmp`) isn't a repo". B: none.
verdict.actionability: A is slightly more operational with CI tools, headers, monitoring, brownouts, and a numbered recommended default; B is cleaner but less complete.
